summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 5 production-grade SaaS features for OmniHub tourism platform. Backend APIs show 94.6% success rate with all major Phase 5 features functional. Frontend shows excellent dashboard and some Phase 5 pages working, but has session management and routing issues preventing full testing of all new pages.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for offer creation
minor_issues.impact: Functional - offer is created successfully, just wrong status code

api_structure_issues.issue: API responses missing some expected keys in structure
api_structure_issues.impact: APIs work but response format may not match frontend expectations

critical_bugs.issue: User session expires quickly causing redirects to login page
critical_bugs.impact: Prevents comprehensive testing of Phase 5 pages

critical_bugs.issue: Some Phase 5 pages (Compliance, Growth, System) not loading via direct navigation
critical_bugs.impact: Users may not be able to access new Phase 5 features consistently

passed_tests: ✅ Backend API Health (35/37 tests passed - 94.6% success rate)
✅ Dashboard KPIs loaded with Phase 5 metrics
✅ Phase 5 Backend APIs: Plans, Usage, Billing, Analytics, Compliance, Growth, System, Onboarding
✅ Analytics API (all sections: revenue ₹865, guests, operations, AI efficiency 1200%)
✅ Billing page frontend (3 plans: Basic $49, Pro $149 current, Enterprise $499)
✅ Analytics page frontend (revenue metrics, request categories, rating distribution, AI performance)
✅ Phase 5 Navigation sidebar items visible (Billing, Analytics, Compliance, Growth, System)
✅ All existing Phase 1-4 API endpoints still working (Requests, Orders, Rooms, Tables, Menu, Contacts, Reviews, Offers, Connectors)
✅ Demo data seeding and reset functionality
✅ Mocked integrations working (AI template v1, Stripe stub, channel connectors)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend session management to prevent premature authentication expiration, and resolve routing issues for Phase 5 pages (Compliance, Growth, System) to ensure all new features are accessible. Also review API response structures to ensure consistent formatting.

success_percentage.frontend: 70% (login, dashboard, billing and analytics pages working, but session/routing issues)
success_percentage.existing_features: 100% (all Phase 1-4 features still working based on API tests)
